nasb.text: ‘Now in the seventh month, on the first day of the month, you shall also have a holy convocation; you shall do no laborious work. It will be to you a day for blowing trumpets.

esv.text: “On the first day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work. It is a day for you to blow the trumpets,

cnv.text: “‘七月第一日，你們要有聖會；甚麼勞碌的工都不可作。這是你們吹角的日子。

ccb.text: “七月一日，你们不可工作，要举行圣会，吹响号角。
